rationale: Option A: 83(b) verification and Mercury bank research. Legal and financial integrity is a security priority. Unverified filings or misconfigured accounts create existential risk. This is not founder ops — it's safeguarding the constitutional foundation. Until these are confirmed, all product work is secondary.
risk_if_other_side_wins: Proceeding with product or infra work while core legal/financial setup is unverified risks compounding hidden defects. A single missed filing or misrouted fund can cascade into regulatory or operational failure.
